channel.title: Mahdiyar Molahasani — Notes
channel.description: Short technical notes from Mahdiyar Molahasani.

item.title: PRISM: Debiasing Vision-Language Models via LLM-Guided Embedding Projection
item.description: A data-free, task-agnostic debiasing framework for CLIP-style vision-language models.

item.title: FedGaLA: Federated Unsupervised Domain Generalization via Gradient Alignment
item.description: First framework for unsupervised federated domain generalization, grounded in a gradient-alignment theory.

item.title: COVID-CXNet: Open Chest X-ray Dataset and Detection Model for COVID-19
item.description: One of the earliest large-scale open datasets and detection models for COVID-19 on frontal chest X-rays.
